What We Do

Our Services

Drywall Repair

Deck Maintenance

Interior Carpentry
SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Built on Trust & Craftsmanship

Founded in 2012 by local craftsman Mike Reynolds, Horizon Handyman began as a one-man operation fixing leaky faucets and squeaky doors in Brookside homes. Today, our team of 20+ skilled technicians continues that same hands-on approach across the metro.

We believe in doing the job right the first time - whether that means matching original 1920s trim details in Waldo or reinforcing garage doors against Midwest storms. Our technicians are background-checked, insured, and trained in the latest techniques.

As Kansas Citians ourselves, we're proud to support local schools and youth sports teams. When you hire us, you're supporting a business that reinvests in our community.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Handyman

Local Experts

We know Kansas City homes inside and out - from historic Brookside bungalows to Northland new builds.

Storm-Ready Repairs

Our solutions account for Midwest weather, preventing future damage from ice storms and clay soil shifts.

No Job Too Small

Whether it's a loose stair rail or full bathroom remodel, we treat every project with equal care.

Clear Communication

You'll always know the timeline, costs, and next steps - no contractor speak or surprises.

Ready for Stress-Free Home Repairs?

Call 555-han-r90 today for a free estimate from Kansas City's most trusted handyman team.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-han-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

After our basement flooded during that bad storm last April, Horizon fixed all the water-damaged drywall in our Brookside home. They matched our original 1930s textured plaster perfectly - you'd never know there was damage. The crew was so careful moving furniture too.

Sarah K. Drywall Repair
“

Our Waldo deck was looking rough after 15 Midwest winters. Horizon replaced the rotted railings with cedar that matches the original, then stained everything to protect against future damage. They even reinforced the stairs that were starting to wobble. Solid work!

James T. Deck Maintenance
“

The original windows in our 1924 bungalow were painted shut and drafty. Horizon restored all 12 windows, replacing broken cords and adding weatherstripping that's cut our heating bill. They took such care with the historic glass - not a single pane was broken during the process.

Megan L. Window Repair
“

We needed our Lee's Summit bathroom made safer for my mom. Horizon installed a beautiful walk-in shower with grab bars that look like towel racks, and a comfort-height toilet. The tile work is flawless, and they finished two days ahead of schedule.

David R. Bathroom Upgrades
“

Horizon built custom bookshelves for our odd-shaped living room in Northland. They matched our existing trim exactly and designed shelves that account for our expansive clay soil. A year later - no gaps or warping like we've had with previous carpenters.

Lisa M. Interior Carpentry
“

Woodpeckers did a number on our Overland Park home's cedar trim. Horizon repaired the damage with synthetic pieces that look identical to the original wood but are pest-resistant. Their paint job has held up perfectly through last winter's ice storms.

Carlos S. Exterior Trim Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long do drywall repairs last in KC's climate?
Our reinforced repairs typically last 8-10 years, even with clay soil movement. We use flexible compounds that move with your home rather than cracking.
Can you match my 1930s plaster walls?
Yes, we've documented textures from all eras of Kansas City homes. Our artisans can recreate everything from skip-trowel to orange peel finishes.
